name: bottom-sheet
description: Gesture-driven bottom sheet with drag-to-dismiss, keyboard avoidance, safe area insets, and focus trap.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback invoked when the sheet is dismissed via drag, backdrop press, or Android back

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the bottom sheet

props.name: visible
props.description: Controlled visibility; when omitted the sheet manages its own state via the ref API

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum sheet height as a fraction of the screen height (0–1)

props.name: showHandle
props.description: Whether to show the drag handle indicator at the top of the sheet

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the sheet container

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Accessibility label for the sheet; defaults to 'Bottom sheet'

examples.label: Example 1
Example 2
examples.code:
// Controlled with custom max height
<BottomSheet visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} maxHeight={0.5}>
  <FilterOptions />
</BottomSheet>

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Sheet without the handle pill, used as a fullscreen modal replacement
<BottomSheet visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} showHandle={false} maxHeight={0.95}>
  <FullScreenForm />
</BottomSheet>
